response: Christopher Nolan’s 2023 drama-history epic “Oppenheimer” runs a hefty 180 minutes and was produced on a $100 million budget, yet it rocketed to a worldwide box-office haul of about $952 million. Sporting an 8.3 rating on IMDb and a 93% score on Rotten Tomatoes, the film not only impressed audiences and critics alike but also captured the Oscar for Best Picture.
